docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY TONOZUKA EIICHI AS TO DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONOZUKA EIICHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.47 INTEREST, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,595.47, PLTF. IS ORDERED TO RETURN CAR TO DEF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21954, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONOZUKA EIICHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA $3,625.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.00, PURCHASE & SALE OF 1966 THUNDERBIRD CAR BY PLTFF TONOZUKA FROM DEFEND. MESSICK IS RESCINDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MESSICK BARBARA
